text: Stepping into this place, I feel both anticipation and curiosity. There is an aura of innovation and discovery—a laboratory of minds at work. The glass doors draw a threshold between the mundanity of the everyday and the vibrant pulse of research and play within. Inside, the colorful displays and illuminated text evoke the thrill of new knowledge, sparking within me a reflective excitement. I feel like both a participant and an observer, ready to contemplate the intersection of human ingenuity and possibility.
